requirement.description: When the hood or rear tailgate state changes, the body controller shall immediately publish the updated compartment open status to the gateway ECU.

test_cases.test_objective: Verify immediate hood Closed → Open transition.
test_cases.expected_result: Bdy_Hood_Open changes from 0 to 1 in next frame
test_cases.python_test_script:
def test_tc_comp_005(can_bus):
    pre = can_bus.recv(timeout=1.0)
    post = can_bus.recv(timeout=1.0)
    assert get_hood(pre.data) == 0 and get_hood(post.data) == 1

def test_tc_comp_007(can_bus):
    pre = can_bus.recv(timeout=1.0)
    post = can_bus.recv(timeout=1.0)
    assert get_tailgate(pre.data) == 0 and get_tailgate(post.data) == 1
